zh.lifeSummary: 當Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier於1359年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛賀布時，他的父親Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie30歲，母親Mor' Marion O'Balbhan30歲。他於大約1390年與Margaret MacLeod of Lewis在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier于1359年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾洛賀布时，他的父亲Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie30岁，母亲Mor' Marion O'Balbhan30岁。他于大约1390年与Margaret MacLeod of Lewis在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Maclean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Ian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of John , also used extensively in the wider English-speaking world.

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Murdoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Muireadhach, meaning ‘lord’, but said to be a derivative of muir ‘sea’.

nameMeanings.name: Magillion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Irish: from Mag Giolláin, a patronymic pet name from giolla ‘lad, servant, or devotee (of a saint)’, meaning ‘son of the wee lad’ or ‘son of the little devotee’.

variants.name: McGillen
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Giolláin, a patronymic pet name from giolla ‘lad, servant, or devotee (of a saint)’, meaning ‘son of the wee lad’ or ‘son of the little devotee’.

en.lifeSummary: When Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier was born in 1359, in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, was 30 and his mother, Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, was 30. He married Margaret MacLeod of Lewis about 1390, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier est né en 1359, à Lochbuie, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret MacLeod of Lewis environ 1390, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Mull, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier 1359 in Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie 30 und seine Mutter Mor' Marion O'Balbhan 30. Er hat um 1390 in Scotland Margaret MacLeod of Lewis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier è nato il nel 1359 nel Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret MacLeod of Lewis circa 1390, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuierが1359年にスコットランドアルグイルロチブイで生まれた時，父Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuieは30歳，母Mor' Marion O'Balbhanは30歳であった。約1390年にスコットランドでMargaret MacLeod of Lewisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年に故郷で66歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ ムルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier(이)가 1359년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mor' Marion O'Balbhan(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1390년 스컷랜드에서 Margaret MacLeod of Lewis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 뮐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier nasceu em 1359, em Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret MacLeod of Lewis aproximadamente 1390, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier родился в 1359 г. в местности лочбуи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret MacLeod of Lewis около 1390 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф мулл, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ian Murdoch Magillion Maclean Murchard Ruaidh or Red Murdoch Second of Lochbuier nació en 1359, en Lochbuie, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Hector ‘Eachann Reganach’ MacLean 1st Of Lochbuie, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mor' Marion O'Balbhan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret MacLeod of Lewis aproximadamente 1390, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Mull, Argyll, Scotland.
